overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from a survival game showing a character walking through a dense snowy forest at night. The character traverses deep snow between pine trees before reaching an overlook with a view of moonlit mountains.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through deep snow on a narrow forest path, weapon visible in right hand

entered.detail: tall evergreen tree heavy with snow on branches, forming a dense wall along the path
tall evergreen tree heavy with snow on branches, creating an enclosed corridor
deep snow covering the forest floor with visible footprints trailing behind

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, enclosed snowy forest path flanked by dense snow-covered pine trees. The sky is mostly obscured by the canopy, and the ground is blanketed in deep snow that the character trudges through.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest path with snow-covered rock outcroppings

events.description: path opens up as large snow-covered rock mound appears on the right side
distant snow-covered mountains become visible through gaps in the trees ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing along the snowy trail, navigating past trees and alongside a large rock formation

entered.detail: large mound of snow-covered rocks and boulders lining the right side of the path
snow-covered mountain peaks visible through the tree line in the distance

segments.scene_description: The forest opens slightly as the character walks past a large snow-covered rock formation on the right. The path becomes less enclosed, and distant snow-covered mountains become visible through the trees ahead.

events.description: character stops walking and begins looking around the landscape
moon becomes visible through clouds, casting pale light on the snowy mountains

agents.ego_description: stopping at the overlook, turning to survey the expansive snowy mountain landscape and moonlit sky

entered.detail: bright moon visible through scattered clouds in the night sky
expansive range of snow-covered mountains filling the background vista

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the forest onto an open overlook with a panoramic view of snow-covered mountains under a moonlit sky. The character stops walking to observe the landscape as the moon becomes visible through the clouds.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic snowy forest that gradually opens into a vast, moonlit mountain vista. It begins with the character trudging through deep snow along a narrow path flanked by dense, snow-covered pine trees that obscure the sky. As the character moves forward, the forest begins to thin and the path opens up past a large snow-covered rock formation, revealing glimpses of distant peaks through the trees. The scene then expands as the character emerges from the tree line onto an open overlook, shifting from the enclosed woods to a panoramic view of snow-covered mountains. Finally, the character comes to a halt to observe the landscape as the moon breaks through the clouds to illuminate the frozen wilderness.
